nasb.text: The mountains saw You and quaked; The downpour of waters swept by. The deep uttered forth its voice, It lifted high its hands.

esv.text: The mountains saw you and writhed; the raging waters swept on; the deep gave forth its voice; it lifted its hands on high.

cnv.text: 諸山見你而顫抖， 眾水暴流而過； 深淵發聲，舉手高揚。

ccb.text: 群山看见你就战栗， 大雨倾盆， 深渊翻腾，波浪滔天。
